clEntries.7.5.45: v7.5.44: Fixed 4 critical runtime errors in button device drivers (Issue #312), Resolved button_wireless_1, 2, 3, 4, 6, 8 press detection and flow trigger issues, Fixed remote_button_wireless and remote_button_wireless_handheld command handling, Corrected scene_switch_1, 2, 3, 4, 6 virtual button flow card registration, Fixed button_emergency_sos device class initialization
clEntries.7.5.44: Bug fixes for wireless buttons, remote buttons, and scene switches. Critical runtime errors resolved in button devices.
clEntries.7.5.43: Bug fixes: wall flow cards on multi-gang switches, wireless button reliability, climate sensor battery/pressure, partial battery sensor fix. Driver updates for soil sensor, button wireless plug, curtain motors, floor heating.
clEntries.7.5.42: v7.5.41: Fixed battery endpoint scan handling for better battery device detection, Fixed Fingerbot capability registration timing (Issue #162), Added 3,202 new fingerprints from ZHA, Z2M, Z-Link and ZCT sources, Improved kinetic detection for soil sensors, Added fingerprint support to soil_sensor, bulb_rgbw, climate_sensor, switch_1gang, wall_remote_2_gang, and wall_switch_1gang_1way drivers
clEntries.7.5.41: v7.5.41 - 3,202 new fingerprints from ZHA, Z2M, Z-Link and ZCT. Battery endpoint scan fix, Fingerbot capability timing fix, and kinetic detection improvement for soil sensors.
clEntries.7.5.40: Bug fix: Empty battery reports on sleepy devices resolved with adaptive battery listeners and ZCL/IAS fallbacks.
clEntries.7.5.39: Updated 3202 fingerprints across 228 drivers. Added new device support and minor fixes.
clEntries.7.5.38: No user-facing changes in this release.
clEntries.7.5.37: Fix all runtime syntax errors, resolve unclosed braces, add support for wall_remote_2_gang assets and validate SDK3 compliance
clEntries.7.5.35: v7.5.34: Fixed condition card registration in `air_quality_comprehensive` and `din_rail_meter` drivers (resolved runtime errors), Restored draft-to-test , Standardized button flow cards (button_pressed, button_double_press, button_long_press, button_multi_press, button_release, knob_rotated), Added OTA check updates action card, Added tuya_dp_send_typed and tuya_dp
